name: Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar to the creamed shortening.
4. Add the egg and mix thoroughly.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk, mixing well after each addition.
6. Add vanilla.
7. Divide dough into two portions.
8. Mix chocolate into one portion of dough.
9. Turn the white dough onto a lightly floured surface and roll out to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
10. Roll the chocolate dough to the same size as the white dough.
11. Place the chocolate dough over the white dough and press firmly together.
12. Roll the combined dough into a jellyroll pan, chilling thoroughly.
13. Cut into thin slices.
14. Place on an oiled baking sheet.
15. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 10-12 minutes.
16. Up to 36 servings.
